message:
Move agent identity files to XDG-compliant persistent paths

Agent Mail identity files were stored in /tmp/ which gets cleared on
reboot, causing agents to lose their identity mappings. This moves
the canonical identity file path to XDG_STATE_HOME (defaulting to
~/.local/state/agent-mail/identity/<sha256(project_key)[0:12]>/<pane_id>)
while maintaining backward-compatible writes to the legacy /tmp/
location for tools that haven't been updated yet.

The new canonical path includes a timestamp alongside the agent name,
enabling staleness detection. SHA256 is used for the project hash
(replacing MD5 for the canonical path) while the legacy path retains
MD5 for backward compatibility.

- internal/cli/spawn.go: +44 lines — new getIdentityFilePath()
  function using XDG_STATE_HOME + SHA256; registerSpawnedAgents()
  writes to both canonical and legacy paths; import crypto/sha256

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
